themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "Jerome on Commentary on Nahum: (Verses 8, 9.) And Nineveh is like a pool of water; its waters...". Word-study detail reinforces "מֵאֶ֙רֶץ֙: from the earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".
